title: Project: Healthy Me App
objectives: Design an app that tracks food intake, sleeping hours, and workouts
Present the app design to classmates

key_concepts.explanation: Students design a health-tracking app with: app name, app icon, and 3 screens. They draw each screen's layout and describe what each screen does. The app should track food intake, sleeping hours, and workouts. Students write descriptions using grammar from the unit (good at, who, which) and present to class.

solution_steps: Write the name of the app
Design First Screen, Second Screen, Third Screen
Write a description for each screen
examples.answer: A completed app design with 3 screens tracking food, sleep, and exercise
examples.visual_description: Three phone outlines with app icon spaces and lines for descriptions

teaching_notes: This project combines digital literacy with health awareness — very relevant for Grade 5. Encourages creative thinking about app design. The writing component uses unit grammar naturally. Good for class presentations and peer rating.
